note: Seeded with three SAMPLE mockups so the gallery renders before the first automated run. The weekly workflow replaces these with real full-page PNG captures.

captures.analysis: ChatGPT leads with a near-blank white canvas and a single centered prompt — 'What can I help with?' — deferring all chrome to a muted left rail. Hierarchy is radically reductive: one composer, a couple of suggestion chips, and the model switcher tucked at top. The green send affordance is the only saturated element, pulling the eye straight to the primary action.

Claude opts for a warm, paper-like cream ground rather than clinical white, giving the surface an editorial, softer feel. A time-aware greeting and a raised composer card create a calm focal point, while intent chips (Write / Learn / Code) frame the tool as task-oriented. The terracotta accent is used sparingly on the logo, primary button, and send control to keep a single consistent brand thread.

Gemini anchors the page with an oversized gradient greeting that doubles as brand signature, spanning Google's blue-to-magenta spectrum. The layout is left-aligned and roomier than its peers, pairing the hero with a row of suggestion cards that preview capabilities rather than starting blank. The rounded 'Ask Gemini' pill and pill-shaped new-chat button echo Material 3's fully-rounded geometry throughout.
